match.userMessage:
Steady handheld drift forward at eye level as Scarlett stands in the shallows looking back over her shoulder with a gentle smile. A fresh wave slides in around her calves, lifting foam that swirls across her feet and wet sand while her posture shifts naturally with the water. Light linen fabric flutters softly against her legs.
Sea breeze moves loose strands of hair across her face as sparkling reflections dance across the incoming water under bright morning light.

gentle ocean waves lapping on shore. soft water surge around legs, foam fizzing on wet sand.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
